ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., 3Y, 4Y, etc.) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the size is intended for (e.g., Men, Women, Kids) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group the size is intended for (e.g., Infant, Toddler, Teen) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., tops, bottoms, etc.) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active and should be displayed on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES clothing_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "inventory_count" INTEGER /* Number of units available in stock */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is active and should be displayed on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the size chart belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size the size chart is for */,
  "height_cm" REAL /* Height of the garment in cm */,
  "chest_cm" REAL /* Chest measurement of the garment in cm */,
  "waist_cm" REAL /* Waist measurement of the garment in cm */,
  "outside_leg_cm" REAL /* Outside leg measurement of the garment in cm */,
  "dress_length_cm" REAL /* Dress length of the garment in cm */,
  "sleeve_length_cm" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement of the garment in cm */,
  "shoulder_width_cm" REAL /* Shoulder width measurement of the garment in cm */,
  "hip_cm" REAL /* Hip measurement of the garment in cm */,
  "is_customizable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the size chart is customizable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer's account */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "is_subscribed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer has subscribed to the newsletter */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shipping address */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the billing address */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "is_gift" INTEGER /* Indicates if the order is a gift */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being ordered */,
  "price_per_unit" REAL /* Price per unit of the product at the time of the order */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Discount applied to the product */,
  "is_gift" INTEGER /* Indicates if the item is a gift */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer the measurement belongs to */,
  "height_cm" REAL /* Height of the customer in cm */,
  "chest_cm" REAL /* Chest measurement of the customer in cm */,
  "waist_cm" REAL /* Waist measurement of the customer in cm */,
  "outside_leg_cm" REAL /* Outside leg measurement of the customer in cm */,
  "dress_length_cm" REAL /* Dress length of the customer in cm */,
  "sleeve_length_cm" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement of the customer in cm */,
  "shoulder_width_cm" REAL /* Shoulder width measurement of the customer in cm */,
  "hip_cm" REAL /* Hip measurement of the customer in cm */,
  "neck_size_cm" REAL /* Neck size measurement of the customer in cm */,
  "inseam_cm" REAL /* Inseam measurement of the customer in cm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer the recommendation belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the recommendation is for */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size recommended for the customer */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score for the recommendation */,
  "date_generated" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was generated */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the review was added */,
  "is_verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is based on a verified purchase */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes the review has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
